summary: Phase 3 testing complete. Validated refined risk model (acwr_zone/monotony_zone/strain_zone/risk_label/risk_description/risk_reasons), POST /api/reset-all wiping team+athletes+sessions+injuries+photos, per-athlete photo upload (JPG/PNG/WebP, <=5MB, public GET, DELETE), and frontend integration (Dashboard RESET TOTAL button with confirmation prompt, inline metrics + alert-desc in alerts panel, PlayerAvatar on Athletes page + AthleteDetail with risk_description). 12/12 new backend tests pass; all frontend critical flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: compute_metrics_for_athlete: the user-requested ACWR threshold spec was 'ACWR 1.3-1.5 = alert' but code uses 'acwr<1.5' (open right) so a value of exactly 1.5 falls into high_risk. Spec said '>=1.5 = high_risk' so this is consistent — OK, just confirm threshold inclusive/exclusive in docs.
compute_metrics_for_athlete: ACWR==0 is treated as 'no recent training' and risk forced to 'low' (Baixa Carga), but acwr can be 0 either because no sessions OR chronic==0. Consider distinguishing.
POST /api/athletes/{id}/photo: file size check happens AFTER full read; for large uploads this still consumes memory. Consider streaming size check, or rely on Content-Length header for early reject.
GET /api/athletes/{id}/photo is intentionally public — fine for , but anyone with a UUID can fetch. Acceptable trade-off; document this.
server.py is now 998 lines and trending toward the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (auth.py, athletes.py, analytics.py, photos.py).

/api/reset-all uses POST without CSRF protection. JWT in httpOnly cookie + same-site=none means a malicious site could POST it cross-origin since CORS allows credentials with *. Tighten FRONTEND_URL env or add a confirmation token from frontend body.
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/seed/demo for fixture; phase3 tests insert/clean their own TEST_ sessions and end by calling /api/reset-all. Note: after running test_phase3_features.py the user's data is fully wiped — re-seed via /api/seed/demo to retest UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 verified. Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_features.py. TestResetAll wipes data at the end — run /api/seed/demo before manual UI demos. Frontend critical flows verified via Playwright: login → dashboard reset-all-btn cancel (wrong prompt text) → athletes page (8 avatars + upload buttons) → athlete detail (avatar + risk_description + metric cards) → photo upload via photo-input-{id} (img src becomes /api/athletes/{id}/photo?v=... with cache-buster, remove-photo button appears) → dashboard correct reset with 'ELIMINAR' → no-team-state shown. Toast 'Todos os dados foram eliminados (8 atletas, 224 sessões, 3 lesões)' confirms backend response. Note: route URL is '/' for dashboard (not /dashboard).

tested_features.risk_zones_fields_present: PASS — acwr_zone/monotony_zone/strain_zone/risk_label/risk_description/risk_reasons returned for every athlete in /api/analytics/team.
tested_features.zone_thresholds_consistent: PASS — per-athlete numeric value mapped to declared zone for ACWR (<0.8, ≤1.3, <1.5, else), monotony (<1.0, ≤1.5, ≤2.0, else), strain (<1500, ≤3000, ≤6000, else).
tested_features.monotony_critical_escalates_to_danger: PASS — injected 7 consecutive monotonous sessions (rpe=10, dur≈90); monotony>2.0, strain_zone=extreme, risk=danger, risk_reasons mentions 'Monotonia crítica' and 'Strain extremo'.
tested_features.photo_upload_png: PASS — returns ok:true, photo_path, url; athlete doc updated with photo_path.
tested_features.photo_get_public: PASS — unauthenticated request returns 200 with Content-Type image/png and valid PNG signature.
tested_features.photo_delete: PASS — DELETE clears photo_path; subsequent GET → 404.
tested_features.reset_all_deletes_everything: PASS — counts returned ({team:1, athletes>=8, sessions>0, injuries>=3}); /api/team → null; /api/athletes → [].
tested_features.reset_all_idempotent_no_data: PASS — second call returns ok with deleted={team:0, ...}.
tested_features.frontend_reset_all_btn_present: PASS — visible next to DADOS DEMO in dashboard header.
tested_features.frontend_reset_all_cancel_on_wrong_text: PASS — entering 'WRONGTEXT' in window.prompt leaves athletes-overview intact.
tested_features.frontend_reset_all_confirm_with_ELIMINAR: PASS — 'ELIMINAR' triggers reset; dashboard shows no-team-state and success toast 'Todos os dados foram eliminados (8 atletas, 224 sessões, 3 lesões)'.
tested_features.frontend_alert_rows_inline_metrics: PASS — each alert row shows 'ACWR 0.78 · Mono 0.74 · Strain 1332' inline; alert-desc-{id} shows risk_description in yellow.
tested_features.frontend_athletes_page_avatars: PASS — 8 athlete cards each with avatar-{id} + upload-photo-{id} controls.
tested_features.frontend_athlete_detail_avatar_and_risk_: PASS — big avatar visible; athlete-risk-description shows 'Sub-treinamento — ACWR abaixo de 0.8 (zona de destreinamento)'.
tested_features.frontend_photo_upload_flow: PASS — setting files on photo-input-{id} triggers POST; avatar img src updates to /api/athletes/{id}/photo?v=<timestamp>; remove-photo-{id} button appears.
